position_has_quantity.fail: Position {ordinal} must not have zero or missing quantity

position_has_unit_rate.fail: Position {ordinal} should have a unit rate assigned
position_has_unit_rate.suggestion: Assign a rate from the cost database

position_has_description.fail: Position {ordinal} cannot have an empty description

unit_rate_in_range.suggestion: Verify this unit rate — it's unusually high

negative_values.suggestion: Correct negative values — use positive numbers

unrealistic_rate.suggestion: Verify this value — it seems unrealistically high

empty_unit.fail: Position {ordinal} has empty or missing unit
empty_unit.suggestion: Assign a measurement unit (m, m2, m3, kg, pcs, lsum, etc.)

section_without_items.suggestion: Add positions under this section or remove the empty section

rate_vs_benchmark.fail: Position {ordinal}: unit rate {rate}/{unit} exceeds benchmark threshold {threshold}/{unit} — potentially unrealistic
rate_vs_benchmark.suggestion: Verify this rate — typical rates for {unit} should be below {threshold}. Check for unit or decimal errors.

lump_sum_ratio.fail: {lsum_count} of {total_count} positions ({percent}) use lump sum — exceeds {threshold} threshold
lump_sum_ratio.suggestion: Break down lump sum positions into measured quantities (m, m2, m3, kg, pcs) for better estimation accuracy

cost_concentration.fail: Position {ordinal} accounts for {share} of total BOQ cost ({value} of {grand_total}) — exceeds {threshold} threshold
cost_concentration.suggestion: Break this position into smaller items or verify the cost — a single position should not dominate the estimate

currency_consistency.suggestion: Use a single currency throughout the BOQ

measurement_consistency.fail: BOQ mixes metric and imperial units — use one system consistently
measurement_consistency.suggestion: Convert all quantities to either metric or imperial units

cost_group_required.suggestion: Assign a 3-digit DIN 276 Kostengruppe (e.g., 330 for walls)

hierarchy.fail: Position {ordinal}: KG {child} is not under parent KG {parent} (expected prefix '{prefix}')
hierarchy.suggestion: Move position to correct parent or update KG code to match parent hierarchy ({prefix}xx)

completeness.fail: KG group {group} — {group_name} is missing from BOQ
completeness.suggestion: Add positions for KG {group} ({group_name}) to ensure complete coverage

ordinal_format.fail: Ordinal '{ordinal}' doesn't match GAEB format XX.XX.XXXX

lv_structure.fail: Position {ordinal}: leaf position has no parent section — GAEB LV hierarchy requires a Leistungsgruppe parent
lv_structure.suggestion: Assign this position to a parent section (Leistungsgruppe / Titel)

einheitspreis_sanity.fail: Position {ordinal}: unit_rate {rate} must be > 0 for non-lump-sum positions (unit='{unit}')
einheitspreis_sanity.suggestion: Provide a positive Einheitspreis or mark the position as lump sum (unit='lsum')

trade_section_code.fail: Top-level section '{ordinal}' has no GAEB Leistungsbereich code (expected 3-digit trade code, e.g. '012')
trade_section_code.suggestion: Add a 3-digit trade code (Leistungsbereich) to the section — e.g. '012' for Erdarbeiten, '013' for Mauerarbeiten

quantity_decimals.fail: Position {ordinal}: quantity {quantity} has {decimals} decimal places — GAEB X83 convention limits to 3
quantity_decimals.suggestion: Round the quantity to at most 3 decimal places per GAEB X83

classification_required.suggestion: Assign an NRM 1/2 element code (e.g., 2.6.1 for external walls)
Assign a MasterFormat code (e.g., 03 30 00 for Cast-in-Place Concrete)

valid_division.suggestion: Use 6-digit MasterFormat format: XX XX XX (e.g., 03 30 00)

code_required.suggestion: Assign a SINAPI composition code (e.g., 87878 for concrete C30)
Assign a ГЭСН code (e.g., 06-01-001-01 for concrete)

valid_code.fail: ГЭСН code '{code}' doesn't match format XX-XX-XXX-XX

lot_required.fail: Position {ordinal} not assigned to any Lot technique
lot_required.suggestion: Assign a Lot technique (e.g., Lot 01 Gros Œuvre)

pricing_complete.fail: Only {priced}/{total} positions ({percent}) have pricing — below 80% threshold
pricing_complete.suggestion: Complete pricing for all positions before DPGF submission

position_format.fail: Ordinal '{ordinal}' doesn't match ÖNORM format XX.XX.XXXXA

description_length.fail: Position {ordinal}: description too short ({length} chars, min 20)
description_length.suggestion: Add more detail to the position description per ÖNORM B 2063

valid_code.fail: Invalid GB/T 50500 code '{code}' — expected 9 or 12 digits

code_required.suggestion: Assign a CPWD DSR item reference (e.g., 4.1.1)

measurement_units.fail: Unit '{unit}' in position {ordinal} not standard IS 1200
measurement_units.suggestion: Use standard IS 1200 units: m, m2, m3, kg, nos, rm, etc.

code_required.fail: Position {ordinal} missing birim fiyat poz number

code_required.suggestion: Assign a 積算基準 item code

metric_units.suggestion: Use standard metric units: m, m2, m3, kg, t, 式, etc.

code_required.suggestion: Assign a FIEBDC-3 code (e.g., E04CM040 or 01.02.01)

valid_code.suggestion: Use FIEBDC-3 alphanumeric format (e.g., E04CM040, 01.02.01, CAP01#)

side_effecting_requires_gate.suggestion: Add a Validation gate or Human-approval gate on every path from a trigger/AI node to each write node before publishing.

escrow_account_required.fail: Development requires an active escrow account for regulator '{regulator}'
escrow_account_required.suggestion: Open an escrow account with the regulator-licensed bank under Compliance → Escrow accounts

escrow_iban_valid.fail: Escrow account {account}: IBAN '{iban}' fails ISO 13616 structural check
escrow_iban_valid.suggestion: Correct the IBAN: country code + length + checksum must match ISO 13616

escrow_balance_reconciled.fail: Escrow account {account}: ledger balance {ledger} drifts {drift} from {transactions} transactions sum
escrow_balance_reconciled.suggestion: Reconcile the escrow account — investigate unrecorded receipts or missing debits

sales_contract_party_ownership_sums_to_1.fail: Contract {contract}: ownership share sums to {total}% (must be exactly 100%)
sales_contract_party_ownership_sums_to_1.suggestion: Adjust party percentages so they total 100.00%

payment_schedule_instalments_sum_to_cont.fail: Contract {contract}: instalments total {instalments} differs from contract value {contract_value} (drift {drift})
payment_schedule_instalments_sum_to_cont.suggestion: Re-balance the payment schedule so instalment amounts add up to the contract total

reservation_expiry_in_future.fail: Reservation {reservation}: expires_at {expires} is not in the future
reservation_expiry_in_future.suggestion: Extend the reservation or transition it to expired/cancelled

broker_commission_rate_within_bounds.suggestion: Use a percent rate between 0.1% and 15%, a flat amount, or a non-empty ladder of tiers

price_matrix_no_negative_modifier.suggestion: Cap modifiers between -50% and +200% to avoid unrealistic plot prices
